headline: Inference efficiency techniques led the month as quantization, memory eviction, and hybrid strategy all broke out together.
body: Quantization held the leading position while memory eviction and hybrid strategy posted matching momentum and broke out alongside it, marking a clear rotation toward serving and long-context efficiency. A cluster of browser-sandboxing techniques entered new: double iframe, same-origin policy, sandbox, and srcdoc, signaling fresh attention to isolating AI-driven web execution. New open-weights releases reinforced the long-context and tool-use theme, with MiniMax M3 supporting million-token windows across coding agents and GLM 5.2 reviewed as a top open-source model. OpenRouter's Fusion added an ensemble routing approach that synthesizes outputs from multiple models at lower cost.
